sources.writer_profile: Food writer for A Signorina in Milan, Jaclyn DeGiorgio provides dining guidance and culinary insights from the Italian fashion capital. Her publication covers the Milan food scene through comprehensive guides that help readers navigate the city's restaurant landscape.

Food writer and Milan-based expert Jaclyn DeGiorgio contributes to A Signorina in Milan, sharing insider knowledge of the city's culinary landscape. Her food guides help readers navigate Milan's diverse dining scene, from traditional trattorias to contemporary restaurants.

Food enthusiast and writer Jaclyn DeGiorgio contributes to A Signorina in Milan, a publication focused on Milan's culinary scene and dining experiences. Her work includes comprehensive food guides that help readers navigate the city's restaurant landscape.

Food writer at The Infatuation, specializing in comprehensive dining guides that help readers discover notable restaurants and eateries. Elizabeth De Filippo-Jones contributes to the publication's mission of providing accessible, expert-driven food recommendations for dining enthusiasts.

Food writer for Eater, Elizabeth De Filippo-Jones contributes to one of the most influential dining and restaurant publications in the industry. Eater covers restaurant news, food culture, and dining guides across major cities, helping readers discover new culinary experiences and stay informed about the latest food trends.

Food writer at Conosco un posto, where she creates comprehensive food guides for discovering exceptional dining experiences. Caterina Zanzi specializes in curating restaurant recommendations and culinary insights for food enthusiasts seeking their next great meal.

Food writer for Conosco un posto, contributing comprehensive food guides that help readers discover new dining destinations. Her recent work includes detailed restaurant recommendations and culinary insights published in December 2025. Caterina Zanzi focuses on creating practical guides for food enthusiasts seeking their next great meal.

Food writer at Il Milanese Imbruttito, covering Milan's dining scene with sharp local insight. His food guides highlight the city's culinary landscape, offering readers authentic perspectives on restaurants and food culture in Milan.

Food writer at Il Milanese Imbruttito, focusing on restaurant guides and culinary recommendations for Milan's dining scene. Davide Frigoli contributes comprehensive food guides that help locals and visitors navigate the city's evolving restaurant landscape.

Food writer for Passione Gourmet, specializing in comprehensive dining guides and culinary recommendations. Davide Scapin Giordani contributes expert insights on restaurant discoveries and food trends through detailed guide coverage.

restaurants.name: Trippa
dishes_mentioned: eggplant with stracciatella and 'nduja tomato confit
green beans with fried hen and Bronte pistachio pesto
restaurants.quote: The menu changes so often that each visit feels like a surprise, and the flavors are always bold, buoyant, and unexpectedly brilliant

restaurants.name: Alba Pasta Bar
dishes_mentioned: casereccia cacio e pepe with lemon and mint
spaghetti with butter, lemon, and bottarga
restaurants.quote: casual but meticulous, centered around a counter where you can watch the team prepare and plate silky strands of handmade pasta

restaurants.name: Botoi
dishes_mentioned: asparagus with kefir, dried tomatoes and sumac
tomato ravioli with almonds, olives and thyme
restaurants.quote: Rosselli, an upbeat thirtysomething, does it all with a smile. You feel like more like a house guest than a restaurant patron

restaurants.name: Denis
dishes_mentioned: Ficus d'Estate pizza with fior di latte, Taggiasca olives, fig jam and pecorino
restaurants.quote: It's not Roman-style crispy, but it's thin and sturdy, without getting soggy and collapsing below the toppings

restaurants.name: Ravioleria Sarpi
restaurants.quote: Third-generation butcher Walter Sirtori and textile entrepreneur Hujian 'Agie' Zhou joined forces to open this ravioleria

restaurants.name: Bar Basso
restaurants.quote: Anyone who's enjoyed an aperitivo lately can thank Bar Basso, an institution that helped expand quality predinner cocktails beyond the walls of sophisticated hotels

restaurants.name: Rovello 18
restaurants.quote: Third-generation chef Michele De Liguoro and his sister named Rovello 18 after the address of their family's fine dining restaurant Da Pierino

restaurants.name: 28 Posti
restaurants.quote: 28 Posti is a respite from the young crowds that gather on the cobblestones outside bars along the canals in Navigli

restaurants.name: Erba Brusca
restaurants.quote: You'll find Erba Brusca alongside the Naviglio Pavese canal, where the city begins to blend with smaller towns

restaurants.name: La Baia
restaurants.quote: A no-fuss, all-heart spot that make you fall in love with Milan all over again

restaurants.name: Shiro
restaurants.quote: The sushi chefs had worked the wasabi into the nigiri – one less thing for me to do, and I appreciated that

restaurants.name: Pastamadre
dishes_mentioned: spaghetti alle chitarre with stracciatella and raw red shrimp
spaghetti alla Nerano with Provolone del Monaco
restaurants.quote: It's one of those rare spots where the food is so consistently good that deciding what to eat becomes its own challenge

restaurants.name: Pavé
dishes_mentioned: pastrami club sandwich on house-made shokupan
restaurants.quote: I went for a sandwich: the pastrami club on house-made shokupan with mixed greens, caramelized onions, and pickles drizzled with sweet honey mustard – a glorious indulgence that was light, flavorful, and truly hit the spot

restaurants.name: Giolina
dishes_mentioned: Giacomina pizza with zucchini, provolone del monaco and basil
restaurants.quote: the menu features Neapolitan-style pizza ringed with a substantial crust, and all the pies have old-schoolish Italian female names

restaurants.name: La Latteria
dishes_mentioned: spaghetti with lemon and fresh green chili
soft eggs baked with butter and topped with bottarga
restaurants.quote: The beloved La Latteria reopened in 2024, which was a huge deal after it closed the year before and left a void in the city

restaurants.name: Dongiò
dishes_mentioned: lightly fried chicory balls on creamy puréed chickpeas
restaurants.quote: Places like Dongiò are here because generations of southern families moved north and kept cooking the food they grew up with

restaurants.name: Cavoli a Merenda
dishes_mentioned: fassona beef tartare with bok choy
squid gnocchetti with potato cream and black truffle
restaurants.quote: There are a handful of historic palaces that used to belong to Italian royalty just a few steps away from the church that houses The Last Supper

restaurants.name: Tipografia Alimentare
restaurants.quote: Tipografia Alimentare is well positioned with outdoor tables along the Martesana canal in the north of Loreto (Nolo) area

restaurants.name: Altatto
restaurants.quote: The two chef partners — Sara Nicolosi and Cinzia de Lauri — met at Joia, where they worked with chef Pietro Leemann

restaurants.name: Trattoria Mirta
restaurants.quote: Uruguayan chef Juan Lema, who named Trattoria Mirta after his mother, puts his own spin on traditional northern Italian dishes

restaurants.name: Berberè
restaurants.quote: Berberè pizzeria prizes the quality of its ingredients over labels like 'bio' (the EU-version of organic)

restaurants.name: Ratanà
restaurants.quote: Ratanà opened in 2009 in a fin-de-siecle villa located in the middle of a once run-down neighborhood

restaurants.name: Ristorante Ribot
restaurants.quote: Located near the racetrack, Ribot is an equestrian-themed restaurant located in a fin-de-siecle villa

restaurants.name: Osteria del Treno
restaurants.quote: Close to Milan's Centrale train station, this historic family-run osteria serves traditional northern Italian fare

restaurants.name: Yoshinobu
restaurants.quote: This high-end restaurant has a well-rounded menu of Japanese dishes, but is primarily known for its sushi and sashimi selection

restaurants.name: Nún
restaurants.quote: A popular lunch spot in Porta Venezia, Nún is a counter-service restaurant with customizable twists on wraps and pitas

restaurants.name: Osteria Alla Concorrenza
restaurants.quote: Chef Diego Rossi of Trippa (also on this list) shares his love for offal and cucina povera at Osteria Alla Concorrenza

restaurants.name: Zia Esterina Sorbillo
restaurants.geo_matched_name: Antica Pizza Fritta da Zia Esterina
restaurants.quote: For the ultimate cheap eat just a few minutes from Piazza Duomo, check out the superlative Neapolitan pizza fritta

restaurants.name: Gastronomia Yamamoto
restaurants.quote: Aya Yamamoto, born in Tokyo and raised in Milan, opened this homey Japanese restaurant to serve 'Grandma's vegetables'

restaurants.name: Bentoteca
dishes_mentioned: rotating menu paired with natural wines
restaurants.quote: Residents flock to Japanese-born Yoji Tokuyoshi's restaurant for the rotating menu paired with natural wines

restaurants.name: Enoteca Naturale
restaurants.quote: Tucked away behind Basilica de Sant'Eustorgio, Enoteca Naturale's large outdoor yard is full of Milanese drinking natural wine

restaurants.name: Macelleria Popolare
restaurants.quote: Macelleria Popolare's counter is a top destination for chefs and diners searching for Italian street foods of yesteryear

restaurants.name: Li-Sei Deli
restaurants.quote: Husband-and-wife duo Okhee Lee and Kihyuk Jung pull from their shared Korean and her Japanese backgrounds

restaurants.name: Cantina Urbana
restaurants.quote: While many Italian drinkers steadfastly adhere to terroir and agrarian tradition, Cantina Urbana's microwinery just outside Milan's center is successfully pushing against those boundaries

restaurants.name: Fat Sam at the Winery
restaurants.quote: mangiare un po' sostanzioso, ma accompagnando il tutto coi vini naturali, non è affatto scontato

restaurants.name: Bites
restaurants.quote: il menu è proprio quello che piace a noi, con abbinamenti e ingredienti in arrivo anche da posti lontani

restaurants.name: La via della seta
restaurants.quote: di ristoranti cinesi a Milano ce ne sono tanti, e distinguersi non è facile, ma questo è un posto che invece ce l'ha fatta

restaurants.name: Autem
restaurants.quote: tra le cene fine dining che ci siamo concessi quest'anno, questa è stata quella che ha fissato l'asticella più in alto

restaurants.name: Luckyman Noodles
restaurants.quote: dopo Casa Ramen e Casa Ramen Super, avevamo proprio bisogno di un posto così, ma a Milano Sud

restaurants.name: Silvano vini e cibi al banco
restaurants.quote: tra le enoteche con cucina questa è la migliore che abbiamo provato quest'anno, e va ben oltre a questo concetto ormai tanto di moda

restaurants.name: Onda
restaurants.quote: la loro pasta e fagioli con astice la vorremmo trovare a casa tutte le sere

restaurants.name: Sandì
restaurants.quote: di ogni piatto che la chef propone nel suo menu esclamo 'Oh mio Dio, sì!'

restaurants.name: Lafa
restaurants.quote: la cucina araba e mediorientale non ci stancano mai. Le spezie e gli abbinamenti utilizzati in cucina rendono tutto molto divertente

restaurants.name: June Collective
restaurants.quote: Perché questa tipologia di bistrot, semplice ma mai banale, secondo noi mancava proprio in città

restaurants.name: Lacerba
dishes_mentioned: salmone in crosta di mandorle arancia e finocchi
restaurants.quote: piatti tradizionali rivisitati per renderli più intriganti, come il salmone in crosta di mandorle arancia e finocchi

restaurants.name: Giulio Pane e Ojo
restaurants.quote: Entrando da Giulio Pane e Ojo sarete subito immersi nel vero ambiente da osteria romana, atmosfera rilassata ma chiassosa e una vasta scelta di piatti della tradizione romanesca, conviene prenotare anche a pranzo

restaurants.name: Antica Pizzeria Fiorentina
restaurants.quote: Vi piace la pizza al trancio, quella col cornicione croccante, cotta nel teglione e quindi leggermente fritta, guarnita di abbondante mozzarella filante?

restaurants.name: VegAmore
restaurants.quote: Si, perché oltre a piatti, polpette, creme e torte, capaci di farvi rivalutare broccoli, cavoli e compagnia ortaggi, VegAmore è arredato con cura e fantasia senza risultare troppo ricercato

restaurants.name: Mahone's Restaurant
restaurants.quote: ragguardevoli hamburger, spezzatini alla birra scura, bistecche da mezzo chilo e naturalmente fish and chips

restaurants.name: Dhole
dishes_mentioned: risotto alle capesante crude e cotte
restaurants.quote: basta un piatto per capire il mood: risotto alle capesante crude e cotte, caviale e fiori di zucca in tempura

restaurants.name: Yuzu
restaurants.quote: classici sapori della cucina del Sol Levante rivisitati in una maniera stravagante che si ispira all'America Latina

restaurants.name: Madama Bistrot
restaurants.quote: Forse è per questo che qui sembra sempre di stare in vacanza, soprattutto quando è bello e ci si può sedere fuori, tantissimi tavoli, chiacchiere e risate ma anche pancini felici

restaurants.name: Osteria dell'Acqua Bella
restaurants.quote: dove si trovano i piatti tipici della cucina milanese, compresa polenta e ossibuchi, a Porta Romana? La risposta è all'Osteria dell'Acqua Bella

restaurants.name: Albertone Fraschetta Romana
restaurants.quote: piatti semplici della cucina romanesca, con porpette rigorosamente con la r da accompagnare con carciofi alla Giuda

restaurants.name: Fujita
restaurants.quote: hamburger in stile giapponese, quello finemente fritto in superficie e servito con la speciale salsa della casa

restaurants.name: Norah Was Drunk
restaurants.quote: ostriche francesi e pesce in scatola incluso baccalà arrosto e il pesce spada nero con pagnottelle

restaurants.name: Pizzeria Trattoria Anthony
dishes_mentioned: pizza con fior di latte, pomodori pachino San Marzano, fior di ricotta, acciughe del mar cantabrico e melanzana fritta
restaurants.quote: pizza con mozzarella fior di latte, pomodori pachino di San Marzano, fior di ricotta, acciughe del mar cantabrico e melanzana fritta

restaurants.name: Joybar Milano
restaurants.quote: bruschetta, con pachino e mozzarelline, tante verdure alla Julienne, paté di olive e basilico e focacce

restaurants.name: La Cappelletta
dishes_mentioned: padellata di manzo argentino con patate, porcini e cipolla
scamorza con trevisana al forno e agretti
restaurants.quote: padellata di manzo argentino con patate, porcini e cipolla, o scamorza con trevisana al forno e agretti

restaurants.name: Osteria al Piccolo Molo
dishes_mentioned: carpaccio di spada con finocchi e mandarino
restaurants.quote: frittura di pesce alla calamarata con paccheri, dal carpaccio di spada con finocchi e mandarino alle tagliatelle con polpa di aragosta
